signals.headline: US and Iran Plan Second Round of Talks Before April 21 Ceasefire Expires | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
US and Iran Plan Second Round of Talks Before April 21 Ceasefire Expires | NO | HIGH confidence**

The two-week ceasefire, announced April 7-8 and mediated by Pakistan, remains in effect until April 21 but is fragile with reported violations by both sides and no deal from initial Islamabad talks.[1][2][3] US and Iranian officials are now preparing for fresh negotiations within days, with Pakistan
